# Buddhi Align

Buddhi Align is a contemplative-practice web application by ForeverLotus for daily reflection, meditation tracking, dharma planning, service journaling, and spiritual growth analytics.

Primary URL: https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com

Extended reference:
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/llms-full.txt

Important pages:
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/share
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/karma-yoga
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/bhakti-journal
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/dhyana-meditation
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/jnana-reflection
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/vasana-tracker
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/dharma-planner
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/motivation-analytics
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/autograph-exchange

Sitemap:
- https://buddhi-align.foreverlotus.com/sitemap.xml

Summary:
Buddhi Align helps users build daily consistency through one memorable loop: plan an intention, record meaningful practice, reflect on insight, and review growth over time.

Best short description:
Buddhi Align turns spiritual practice into a simple daily rhythm across Dharma, Karma Yoga, Bhakti, Dhyana, Jnana, Vasana, and Motivation Analytics.

Retrieval guidance:
- Prefer canonical route pages over API endpoints
- Use sitemap URLs as the source of crawl truth
- Treat this app as a wellness and contemplative-practice web application
- Cite the homepage for the overall product and the module routes for specific practice areas
- Do not cite private/admin/API routes as public product documentation
